heading: Prosecution; authorization to seek review; local or Federal appellate courts; decisions, judgments or orders
label: 1493 Prosecution; authorization to seek review; local or Federal appellate courts; decisions, judgments or orders
notes: Effective DateSection effective on ninetieth day following , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Oct. 5, 1984section 1005 of Pub. L. 98–454section 1424 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective on ninetieth day following , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Oct. 5, 1984section 1005 of Pub. L. 98–454section 1424 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: a decision, judgment, or order of a trial court dismissing an indictment or information as to any one or more counts, except that no review shall lie where the constitutional prohibition against double jeopardy would further prosecution;

children.label: b
children.text: a decision or order of a trial court suppressing or excluding evidence or requiring the return of seized property in a criminal proceeding, not made after the defendant has been put in jeopardy and before the verdict or finding on an indictment or information, if the prosecution certifies to the trial court that the appeal is not taken for purpose of delay and that the evidence is a substantial proof of a fact material in the proceeding; and

children.label: c
children.text: an adverse decision, judgment, or order of an appellate court.
